command:
cd /tmp/moreno-ai-setup && git pull origin main

echo "=== RUNNING GENERATOR ==="
echo "" | base64 -d > /tmp/ssr_gen.py
python3 /tmp/ssr_gen.py

echo ""
echo "=== CHANGED FILES ==="
git diff --stat HEAD

echo ""
echo "=== COMMIT ==="
git add docs/single-shared-reality-architecture.md \
        docs/memory-runtime-architecture.md \
        docs/living-agent-ecosystem.md

git status --short | head -10

git commit -m "Phase 9E Roadmap — Single Shared Reality Architecture Note"

echo ""
echo "=== TAG ==="
git tag Phase9E-SingleSharedRealityNote

echo ""
echo "=== PUSH ==="
git push origin main && git push origin Phase9E-SingleSharedRealityNote
git push github main && git push github Phase9E-SingleSharedRealityNote

echo ""
echo "=== VERIFY — no runtime files changed ==="
git show --stat HEAD | head -20
